subcodes.first_line: O ye who are connected with his honor the pilgrim, Jinab-i-Aqa Mirza Muhammad! For some days he hath been a companion, confidant and intimate friend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متعلقان حضرت زائر جناب آقا میرزا محمد ایامی چند است که مونس و همدم و همراز
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation
